title: Senior Software Engineer - Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd!
